Professional Experience

A journey through e-commerce, trading, healthcare, and smart home innovation.

Jun 2025 — Present

iOS Developer

Nykaa

Built and delivered features for a high-traffic consumer e-commerce iOS application. Contributed to the gradual migration from UIKit to SwiftUI, implemented a dual UI architecture using feature flags, and delivered the end-to-end payment flow for the Nike India iOS app.

SwiftUI Payments SDK Firebase Deep Links
Jun 2024 — Feb 2025

KMP / Mobile Developer

Punch Trade (Market Pulse)

Drove development of a single-screen F&O and stock trading mobile application across iOS and Android. Architected KMP / KMM solutions enabling shared business logic, designed a KMP SDK for onboarding and KYC, and built a custom widget framework.

KMP Android / iOS A/B Testing SDK Design
Nov 2023 — May 2024

iOS Developer

Yanthraa Information Systems

Led the migration of core modules from Objective-C to Swift, modernizing the codebase. Integrated 20+ REST API endpoints, developed dynamic UI components for real-time drug information, and resolved critical bugs improving overall app stability.

Swift Objective-C REST API UI/UX
May 2022 — Oct 2023

iOS Developer

Raja Software Labs

Contributed to the Google Home iOS application with 100M+ downloads. Delivered 30+ user-facing features, optimized device setup flows for Nest and Chromecast, and improved application performance by reducing feature response time by 20%.

Swift Objective-C MVVM / MVC IoT
